sections.paragraph: [Uzal], Gen 10:27 one of the descendants of Joktan, but here taken in a geographical sense, a city or region of the Joktanite Arabs, afterward called Sanaa, which is the metropolis of the kingdom of Yemen. See Bocharti Phaleg. ii, 21; J. D. Michaelis, Spicil. Geogr. Hebr. ext. tom. ii. p. 164, sqq. [“Autger’s Hist. Jemenæ, p. 217.”]
